content: Just as the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol standardizes cross-framework communication between separate AI agents, we could build a standardized A2A sub-protocol that lets computer-using agents (CUAs) communicate directly with the graphical user interfaces (GUIs) they manipulate, rather than only mimicking human clicks and inputs. This would let CUAs pull structured context directly from GUIs instead of relying solely on visual screen interpretation, cutting down on action errors from misreading screen elements.
